projects.title: Aetheria Estates
projects.description: Ultra-premium digital showcase for elite real estate portfolios in Monaco and Zurich.
projects.richText: Aetheria Estates is a bespoke digital platform catering to high-net-worth individuals. Engineered using Next.js with Server-Side Rendering (SSR), it provides an immersive 3D walkthrough experience (integrated with WebGL) and elegant fluid-scroll typography. The backend utilizes advanced caching algorithms for instant load times under 0.4 seconds.

projects.title: Chronos Horology
projects.description: An interactive luxury catalog and customizer for haute horology brands.
projects.richText: Chronos is an editorial e-commerce exploration built for luxury Swiss watchmakers. Featuring customizable spring animations, interactive 360-degree product tilts, and high-fidelity image loaders, it replicates the physical luxury experience in a browser window. The system integrates seamless API pipelines for private client booking.

testimonials.name: Maximilian Vance
testimonials.content: Refayet has an incredibly rare gift of combining mathematical engineering performance with fine-arts design quality. Our website load speeds dropped to instant, and our customer engagement skyrocketed by 40% after launching the new luxury portal.

testimonials.name: Elena Rostova
testimonials.content: Aura completely redefined our digital image. The parallax fluid layouts and attention to minor details feel as premium as our physical craftsmanship. A stellar partner for luxury digital products.

blogs.title: The Architecture of Lightning-Fast Animations
blogs.content:
## 1. Frame rate preservation in modern browsers
Preserving a constant 60fps (or 120fps on modern screens) is critical to maintaining a luxury feeling. Dropped frames disrupt the visual flow. We achieve this by moving heavy rendering tasks off the main thread:
- Use hardware-accelerated CSS transforms (`translate3d`, `scale`).
- Minimize paint invalidation zones.
- Leverage GPU compositing.

## 2. Dynamic easing equations
Luxury interfaces rely on custom cubic-bezier curves rather than default ease-in or ease-out timings. The transition timing must feel deliberate:
- **Cubic Bezier (0.16, 1, 0.3, 1):** Highly recommended for fluid, premium slide-outs.
- **Spring Physics:** Used dynamically in Framer Motion to preserve natural inertia.

blogs.title: Zero Latency: Optimizing Next.js for Monaco and Beyond
blogs.content:
## 1. Static site pre-generation
By pre-building all our routes to static HTML on the server side, browser load times are reduced to standard CDNs edge speeds. Pages serve in under 100 milliseconds, globally.

## 2. In-memory data caches
We route database queries into a local file-based cache to bypass Atlas latency on dynamic requests. When database changes occur, the admin API triggers an on-demand revalidation.

settings.heroSubtitle: We craft high-performance digital systems and luxury portfolios with absolute pixel perfection.
settings.aboutText: Aura is a digital creative studio led by Refayet. We reject average layouts. We blend fine-arts editorial design with bleeding-edge technology to build digital portals that feel exclusive, load instantly, and leave a permanent imprint on the high-end digital landscape.
settings.footerText: © 2026 AURA. Meticulously crafted for high-end digital presence.
settings.typewriterRoles: Full Stack Developer, Shopify Developer, Next.js Architect
